Flag Monthly enrollment flag indicates the Medicare Enrollment category of the beneficiary for the given month (1 = ESRD, 2 = Disabled, 3 = Aged/Dual, 4 = Aged/Non-dual). CHAR 1 - - - - x x x x x x x
ADI_NATRANK ADI National Percentile Rank ADI is determined based on most recent available data within the Shared Savings Program ACO report period. 
A small number of beneficiaries will not receive ADI because of address changes or census block groups. These beneficiaries will receive an imputed
